'''ET-74 communications droids''' were a [[Supervisor droid/Legends|supervisor droid]] model developed by [[Automata Galactica/Legends|Automata Galactica]] during the [[Old Sith Wars]] era.

They were designed to handle communications tasks and coordinate the work of [[Labor droid/Legends|labor droids]]. Programmed with a mastery of communications systems, data transmission and reception systems, and computer systems and networks, they were able to handle a variety of tasks in multiple industries. Often found on [[Space station/Legends|space stations]] and [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]], they could temporarily replace crew members by manning the communications and sensor stations for a short time.

==Characteristics==
The ET-74 was a [[Human/Legends|Human]]-sized biped, stronger than the [[construction droid foreman]], but more dexterous than the [[construction droid Mark II]].<ref name="kotor2" /> They could speak and understand [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]], [[Binary/Legends|binary]], and up to five other user-selected languages.<ref name="kotorcg" />

==History==
[[File:ET-74_KOTORCG.jpg|thumb|250px|An ET-74 communications droid]]
This model was known to have been used circa [[3951 BBY]]. ET-74 droids were put in charge of [[Mining/Legends|mining]], construction, and excavation droids whose tasks required coordination to ensure completion. They were sometimes mistaken for simple labor droids, but in actuality they were directing the less intelligent droids under their charge.<ref name="kotorcg" /> Several were found in Mandalorian caches on [[Dxun/Legends|Dxun]], and at least one such droid worked in [[Vogga]]'s warehouse on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]].<ref name="kotor2" />
